calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:14am
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Nikola Basich appears with his attorney Brenda Keith. Respondents Marcella Flores and Robin Gonzalez appear in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Sleight.

EXHA(1) 5 page Statement of Facts
EXHA(2) Tenant Deficiency Letter dated 3/18/08
EXHA(3) Floor plan
EXHA(4) 2 estimates

EXHR(A) Letter from Housing Rights Committee of San Francisco
EXHR(B) Additional letter from Housing Rights Committee of San Francisco
EXHR(C) Letters dated 8/2/05 and 6/10/05 to Mr. Basich from Housing Authority
EXHR(D) 5 pages of medical documents
EXHR(E) packet of receipts
Photos provided by Respondent are handed to Judge Sleight at the end of testimony and will be retained with the marked exhibits.
Respondents provided video of removed carpets (on cell phone) which was reviewed by Appellant and then by Judge Sleight.

12:3pm
Evidence is retained and case is taken under submission.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-10-2009 Judgment Entered
